title: Why Technologists Need to Get Involved in Public Policy?
summary: Codex's "World's Top 50 Innovators 2019" event took place at the Royal Society in London from 23–25 September 2019. Bruce Schneier gave a 15-minute talk during the Cyber Security Session.
body: Note Codex's "World's Top 50 Innovators 2019" event took place at the Royal Society in London from 23–25 September 2019. Bruce Schneier gave a 15-minute talk during the Cyber Security Session.
